title: Blast Travel Reborn
body:
Mirgate from [blast-travel](https://modrinth.com/mod/blast-travel/)
Thanks for [FoundationGames](https://github.com/FoundationGames) And [Abbie5](https://github.com/Abbie5)

# Blast Travel Reborn **Get from point A to B quickly and in style with cannons!** ![Blast Travel](https://github.com/FoundationGames/BlastTravel/raw/modfest/img/blast_travel.png)

## Getting Started **Craft the cannon:** ![Blast Travel](https://github.com/FoundationGames/BlastTravel/raw/modfest/img/recipe.png) **Prepare the cannon:** ![cannon](https://github.com/FoundationGames/BlastTravel/raw/modfest/img/cannon_ui.png) **Fire the cannon:** - Sneak + interact with (shift-right-click on) the cannon to open its UI - Add gunpowder to the first slot (more will fire farther and faster) - Add chains to the second slot to lock the cannon - Add a decoration block (gold, moss) to the third slot, or optionally add alternative ammunition (tnt, anvils) ![Player In Cannon](https://github.com/FoundationGames/BlastTravel/raw/modfest/img/in_cannon.png) - Enter the cannon by interacting with (right-clicking on) it - If the cannon is not chained, look around to aim the cannon - Jump (press space) while inside the cannon to fire - If you would like to fire something else (alternative ammunition, or another player), power the cannon with redstone
